title: RGAS realises IDR 35.18 billion of IPO proceeds
body: RGAS realised IDR35.18 billion or 99.9% of the net proceeds from the IPO of IDR35.19 billion on November 8, 2023.

title: 468 million Impack Pratama (IMPC) shares acquired by Harimas Tunggal Perkasa
body: Following the completion of the purchase of these shares through PT Verdhana Sekuritas Indonesia, the investor's share percentage grew to 19.73%.

title: Another lay-off wave to hit, now it’s Bukalapak
body: BUKA is set to terminate a number of employees following its business shift to focus exclusively on virtual product services.

title: Astra's car sales drop by 13.86% yoy in 2024
body: According to data from Indonesian Automotive Industry Association (GAIKINDO), brands under Astra's umbrella continue to dominate the market.

title: IPO stocks dominate Top Gainers, CBDK takes first place
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) has seen 8 new listed companies since the start of this year.

body: BUKA is set to terminate a number of employees following its business shift to focus exclusively on virtual product services.

title: IPO stocks dominate Top Gainers, CBDK takes first place
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) has seen 8 new listed companies since the start of this year.

title: A year after IPO, performance of two issuers declines
body: ACRO and MANG have declined after being listed on the stock market for a year since January 11, 2024.

title: JCI corrected in the first session early this week
body: JCI experienced a correction during the opening of the first trading session by 09.46 AM WIB on Monday (13/1).

title: OBAT now publicly listed, offering warrant bonus and dividend
body: It is worth noting that OBAT has consistently distributed dividends to its shareholders, amounting to IDR 40 billion over the past five years.

title: Take a look at SBMA's strategy to maintain profitability in 2025
body: SBMA's focus on medical gas, specialty gas, and the metallurgy sector forms part of its long-term strategy.

title: 19 companies in IPO pipeline, most boast large assets
body: At least 17 of the 19 companies have substantial assets, meanwhile the other two companies in the IPO pipeline have medium-sized assets.

title: PANI subsidiary goes public, oversubscribed by 344 times
body: Shortly after trading opened today, CBDK shares hit the upper limit for Auto Reject (ARA).

title: McMahon Holding to manage INDY’s gold mine in South Sulawesi
body: The mining contract will span seven years, with an option to extend for an additional five years.

title: Fraud in financial services sector on the rise, OJK introduces new regulation
body: SIPELAKU will assist in disseminating a database of conduct records.

title: Pertamina to acquire 20% stake in Philippine renewable energy firm
body: Pertamina is projected to spend approximately USD 115 million for CREC acquisition.

title: JCI drops 1.05% over the week, SOEs being the laggards
body: SOE stocks drag JCI down, still supported by conglomerates' shares.

title: IDX welcomes 3 new issuers, Aguan’s included
body: These three companies are engaged in the healthcare and property segment, one of which belongs to the property mogul Aguan.

title: Foreign investors are still selling shares; 469 million shares have been sold
body: The total number of shares traded by foreign investors hit 3 billion. Sales volume was higher at 3.57 billion shares, but foreign purchase volume was 3.10 billion shares.

title: ANTM's gold exploration costs reach IDR 271 billion as of December 2024
body: Gold exploration was conducted in Pongkor, West Java, involving drilling activities including in-mine drilling (underground) and deep drilling (surface).

title: BRMS tops Net Foreign Buy at week’s end
body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) rose to the top spot for net foreign buy at the closing bell of stock trading at the end of the week (10/1).

title: Bank Indonesia Survey: Inflation pressure rises in February 2025
body: BI's Retail Sales Survey projects inflation to rise in IEH for February 2025, ahead of Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr

title: IDX suspends DMND, reasons revealed
body: IDX suspends DMND shares due to low liquidity in the past three months.

title: Antam to launch thematic gold for Chinese New Year
body: Aneka Tambang officially launched a special edition of thematic gold to celebrate the upcoming 2025 Chinese New Year.

title: A year post-IPO: MSJA's performance rises, SMLE declines
body: A year after their debut on the stock market, two listed companies have recorded contrasting stock performance. MSJA saw its stock price grow, while SMLE experienced a decline.

title: POSA injects capital into three subsidiaries
body: “The capital increase was carried out through a debt-to-equity conversion mechanism in three subsidiaries: PT Tanjung Pinang Indah, PT Lahan Makmur Indah, and PT ABC Bali Laut.”

title: AMMN shows exponential growth in Q3 2024
body: Despite stellar financial performance, AMMN’s stock has been slowing down over the past six months.

title: Episenta Utama acquires 26 million shares in Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal (PORT)
body: This investor increased their ownership to 24.15% by purchasing these shares through PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk.

title: BYAN explores three mining areas in Q4
body: Three BYAN's subsidiaries carried out mining exploration activities in three areas in the fourth quarter of 2024.

title: Teguk closes down over 100 outlets a year post-IPO; what gives?
body: Decline in people's purchasing power dragged TGUK's performance down, forcing the company to close down over 100 stores.

title: CUAN added to UMA list again, here’s the company’s response
body: CUAN was also included in the UMA list on May 2, 2024. In 2023, CUAN also frequently faced trading suspensions on the IDX.

title: Official, CSIS is greenlit for rights issue of 3.92 billion shares
body: CSIS, the manufacturer of household product brand Olympic, will conduct a rights issue of 3.9 billion shares.

title: Indonesia partners with Qatari investors for 1 million affordable housing program
body: Qilaa Internasional Group has signed an MoU with the government regarding this program.

title: INPP transfers 36.7% subsidiary’s shares to Hankyu Hanshin
body: INPP divests 36.7% of NAP to Hankyu Hanshin, Japan, for IDR 652.65 billion.

title: BSI's SBSN transactions surge by 65.38%
body: The company distributed five SBSN series, namely SR020, ST012, SWR005, SR021, and ST013.

title: CASH’s shareholders name ex-banker to be President Director
body: The new president director is said to have quite an extensive experience in the financial industry.

title: JCI corrected 0.22%, foreign investors recorded net buy
body: Foreign investors started to record net buy in the capital market, after several days of consistent net sell.
